description_long: This is a freestanding, three-tiered metal display rack with a rectangular signboard at the top, prominently featuring the 'Estrella' branding on each shelf and the sign. The structure is composed of thin, tubular metal rods forming the frame and shelf supports, giving it an open, airy appearance. Each shelf is flat and bordered by a low metal rail to prevent items from falling off, making it suitable for displaying products in urban retail or sidewalk settings. The signboard at the top is solid and rectangular, designed to attract attention and provide branding or product information. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, optimized for easy access and visibility of displayed items. The dark color and metallic finish suggest durability and resistance to outdoor conditions.
description: A freestanding, three-tiered metal display rack with a prominent branded signboard and open wire shelves, designed for product display in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves, each with 'Estrella' branding, and a large branded signboard at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, tubular metal frame and the depth of the shelves, with the signboard extending above.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open wire structure and the back of the signboard, with no branding visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the frame and shelf depth from the other side.
